title: Huawei AR720 Multi-WAN router
category: Huawei / LAN networks / Routers and Firewalls
description: Huawei AR720 features 8x LAN ports with a speed of 1 Gbps and a pair of combo ETH / SFP ports with a speed of 1 Gbps , which can be configured as LAN / WAN . It also includes two USB 2.0 ports, two SIC slots for expansion cards, and an RJ45 port for console connection The Huawei NetEngine AR series of routers represents the next generation of routing devices, offering SD-WAN, routing, switching, VPN, and much more Device Rack mounts (6) Screws Power cable 230 V Ground cable (4) Rubber feets
